bio: While one alone doesn’t have much power, a chain of many Tynamo can be as powerful as lightning.

name: eelektrik
bio: They coil around foes and shock them with electricity-generating organs that seem simply to be circular patterns.

name: eelektross
bio: They crawl out of the ocean using their arms. They will attack prey on shore and immediately drag it into the ocean.

name: elgyem
bio: It uses its strong psychic power to squeeze its opponent’s brain, causing unendurable headaches.

name: beheeyem
bio: It can manipulate an opponent’s memory. Apparently, it communicates by flashing its three different-colored fingers.

name: litwick
bio: Litwick shines a light that absorbs the life energy of people and Pokémon, which becomes the fuel that it burns.

name: lampent
bio: This ominous Pokémon is feared. Through cities it wanders, searching for the spirits of the fallen.

name: chandelure
bio: It absorbs a spirit, which it then burns. By waving the flames on its arms, it puts its foes into a hypnotic trance.

name: axew
bio: They use their tusks to crush the berries they eat. Repeated regrowth makes their tusks strong and sharp.

name: fraxure
bio: Since a broken tusk will not grow back, they diligently sharpen their tusks on river rocks after they’ve been fighting.

name: haxorus
bio: They are kind but can be relentless when defending territory. They challenge foes with tusks that can cut steel.

name: cubchoo
bio: When it is not feeling well, its mucus gets watery and the power of its Ice-type moves decreases.

name: beartic
bio: It can make its breath freeze at will. Very able in the water, it swims around in northern seas and catches prey.

name: cryogonal
bio: When its body temperature goes up, it turns into steam and vanishes. When its temperature lowers, it returns to ice.

name: shelmet
bio: When attacked, it defends itself by closing the lid of its shell. It can spit a sticky, poisonous liquid.

name: accelgor
bio: When its body dries out, it weakens. So, to prevent dehydration, it wraps itself in many layers of thin membrane.

name: stunfisk
bio: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

name: mienfoo
bio: In fights, they dominate with onslaughts of flowing, continuous attacks. With their sharp claws, they cut enemies.

name: mienshao
bio: It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen.

name: druddigon
bio: It warms its body by absorbing sunlight with its wings. When its body temperature falls, it can no longer move.

name: golett
bio: The energy that burns inside it enables it to move, but no one has yet been able to identify this energy.

name: golurk
bio: It flies across the sky at Mach speeds. Removing the seal on its chest makes its internal energy go out of control.

name: pawniard
bio: Blades comprise this Pokémon’s entire body. If battling dulls the blades, it sharpens them on stones by the river.

name: bisharp
bio: It leads a group of Pawniard. It battles to become the boss, but will be driven from the group if it loses.

name: bouffalant
bio: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

name: rufflet
bio: They crush berries with their talons. They bravely stand up to any opponent, no matter how strong it is.

name: braviary
bio: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

name: vullaby
bio: Their wings are too tiny to allow them to fly. They guard their posteriors with bones that were gathered by Mandibuzz.

name: mandibuzz
bio: It makes a nest out of bones it finds. It grabs weakened prey in its talons and hauls it to its nest of bones.

name: heatmor
bio: It breathes through a hole in its tail while it burns with an internal fire. Durant is its prey.

name: durant
bio: They attack in groups, covering themselves in steel armor to protect themselves from Heatmor.

name: deino
bio: It tends to bite everything, and it is not a picky eater. Approaching it carelessly is dangerous.

name: zweilous
bio: After it has eaten up all the food in its territory, it moves to another area. Its two heads do not get along.

name: hydreigon
bio: This brutal Pokémon travels the skies on its six wings. Anything that moves seems like a foe to it, triggering its attack.

name: larvesta
bio: This Pokémon was believed to have been born from the sun. When it evolves, its entire body is engulfed in flames.

name: volcarona
bio: When volcanic ash darkened the atmosphere, it is said that Volcarona’s fire provided a replacement for the sun.

name: cobalion
bio: This legendary Pokémon battled against humans to protect Pokémon. Its personality is calm and composed.

name: terrakion
bio: This Pokémon came to the defense of Pokémon that had lost their homes in a war among humans.

name: virizion
bio: This Pokémon fought humans in order to protect its friends. Legends about it continue to be passed down.

name: reshiram
bio: This Pokémon appears in legends. It sends flames into the air from its tail, burning up everything around it.

name: zekrom
bio: Concealing itself in lightning clouds, it flies throughout the Unova region. It creates electricity in its tail.

name: kyurem
bio: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

name: genesect
bio: Over 300 million years ago, it was feared as the strongest of hunters. It has been modified by Team Plasma.

name: chespin
bio: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

name: quilladin
bio: It relies on its sturdy shell to deflect predators’ attacks. It counterattacks with its sharp quills.

name: chesnaught
bio: Its Tackle is forceful enough to flip a 50-ton tank. It shields its allies from danger with its own body.

name: fennekin
bio: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: braixen
bio: It has a twig stuck in its tail. With friction from its tail fur, it sets the twig on fire and launches into battle.

name: delphox
bio: It gazes into the flame at the tip of its branch to achieve a focused state, which allows it to see into the future.

name: froakie
bio: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

name: frogadier
bio: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

name: greninja
bio: It creates throwing stars out of compressed water. When it spins them and throws them at high speed, these stars can split metal in two.

name: bunnelby
bio: They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.

name: diggersby
bio: With their powerful ears, they can heft boulders of a ton or more with ease. They can be a big help at construction sites.

name: fletchling
bio: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.

name: fletchinder
bio: From its beak, it expels embers that set the tall grass on fire. Then it pounces on the bewildered prey that pop out of the grass.

name: talonflame
bio: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

name: scatterbug
bio: When under attack from bird Pokémon, it spews a poisonous black powder that causes paralysis on contact.

name: spewpa
bio: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.

name: vivillon
bio: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.

name: litleo
bio: The stronger the opponent it faces, the more heat surges from its mane and the more power flows through its body.

name: flabebe
bio: It draws out and controls the hidden power of flowers. The flower Flabébé holds is most likely part of its body.

name: floette
bio: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the hidden power of flowers to battle.

name: florges
bio: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.

name: skiddo
bio: Thought to be one of the first Pokémon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.

name: gogoat
bio: It can tell how its Trainer is feeling by subtle shifts in the grip on its horns. This empathic sense lets them run as if one being.

name: pancham
bio: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.

name: pangoro
bio: Although it possesses a violent temperament, it won’t put up with bullying. It uses the leaf in its mouth to sense the movements of its enemies.

name: furfrou
bio: Trimming its fluffy fur not only makes it more elegant but also increases the swiftness of its movements.

name: espurr
bio: The organ that emits its intense psychic power is sheltered by its ears to keep power from leaking out.

name: honedge
bio: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: doublade
bio: When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.

name: spritzee
bio: It emits a scent that enraptures those who smell it. This fragrance changes depending on what it has eaten.

name: aromatisse
bio: It devises various scents, pleasant and unpleasant, and emits scents that its enemies dislike in order to gain an edge in battle.

name: swirlix
bio: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.

name: slurpuff
bio: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.

name: inkay
bio: Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.

name: malamar
bio: It wields the most compelling hypnotic powers of any Pokémon, and it forces others to do whatever it wants.

name: binacle
bio: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.

name: barbaracle
bio: When they evolve, two Binacle multiply into seven. They fight with the power of seven Binacle.

name: skrelp
bio: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.

name: dragalge
bio: Their poison is strong enough to eat through the hull of a tanker, and they spit it indiscriminately at anything that enters their territory.

name: clauncher
bio: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.

name: clawitzer
bio: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.

name: helioptile
bio: They make their home in deserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.

name: heliolisk
bio: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficient electricity to power a skyscraper.

name: tyrunt
bio: This Pokémon was restored from a fossil. If something happens that it doesn’t like, it throws a tantrum and runs wild.

name: tyrantrum
bio: Thanks to its gargantuan jaws, which could shred thick metal plates as if they were paper, it was invincible in the ancient world it once inhabited.

name: amaura
bio: This ancient Pokémon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.

name: aurorus
bio: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.

name: sylveon
bio: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.

name: hawlucha
bio: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.

name: dedenne
bio: Its whiskers serve as antennas. By sending and receiving electrical waves, it can communicate with others over vast distances.

name: carbink
bio: Born from the temperatures and pressures deep underground, it fires beams from the stone in its head.

name: goomy
bio: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn’t dry out.

name: sliggoo
bio: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.

name: goodra
bio: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.

name: klefki
bio: These key collectors threaten any attackers by fiercely jingling their keys at them.

name: phantump
bio: These Pokémon are created when spirits possess rotten tree stumps. They prefer to live in abandoned forests.

name: trevenant
bio: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.

name: bergmite
bio: It blocks opponents’ attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.

name: avalugg
bio: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.

name: noibat
bio: They live in pitch-black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.

name: noivern
bio: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.

name: xerneas
bio: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.

name: yveltal
bio: When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.

name: diancie
bio: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

name: hoopa
bio: This troublemaker sends anything and everything to faraway places using its loop, which can warp space.

name: volcanion
bio: It lets out billows of steam and disappears into the dense fog. It’s said to live in mountains where humans do not tread.

name: rowlet
bio: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.

name: dartrix
bio: A bit of a dandy, it spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.

name: decidueye
bio: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.

name: litten
bio: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

name: torracat
bio: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.

name: incineroar
bio: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. If it’s not in the mood to listen, it will ignore its Trainer’s orders with complete nonchalance.

name: popplio
bio: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.

name: brionne
bio: A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.

name: primarina
bio: It controls its water balloons with song. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down from one generation to the next.

name: pikipek
bio: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and for nesting.

name: trumbeak
bio: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.

name: toucannon
bio: When it battles, its beak heats up. The temperature can easily exceed 212 degrees Fahrenheit, causing severe burns when it hits.

name: yungoos
bio: With its sharp fangs, it will bite anything. It did not originally live in Alola but was imported from another region.

name: gumshoos
bio: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location...but it’s always snoozing by nightfall.

name: grubbin
bio: Its strong jaw enables it to scrape trees and slurp out the sap. It normally lives underground.

name: charjabug
bio: Its body is capable of storing electricity. On camping trips, people are grateful to have one around.

name: vikavolt
bio: It zips around, on sharp lookout for an opening. It concentrates electrical energy within its large jaws and uses it to zap its enemies.

name: crabrawler
bio: While guarding its weak points with its pincers, it looks for an opening and unleashes punches. When it loses, it foams at the mouth and faints.

name: crabominable
bio: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved and grew fur.

name: cutiefly
bio: It feeds on the nectar and pollen of flowers. Because it’s able to sense auras, it can identify which flowers are about to bloom.

name: ribombee
bio: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others used in battle.

name: rockruff
bio: It’s considered to be a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendliness, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.

name: mareanie
bio: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.

name: toxapex
bio: Toxapex crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.

name: mudbray
bio: The mud stuck to Mudbray’s hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.

name: mudsdale
bio: It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it.

name: dewpider
bio: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.

name: araquanid
bio: It delivers headbutts with the water bubble on its head. Small Pokémon get sucked into the bubble, where they drown.

name: fomantis
bio: During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep.

name: lurantis
bio: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis’s vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.

name: morelull
bio: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.

name: shiinotic
bio: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People confused by its strange lights can never find their way home again.

name: salandit
bio: It burns its bodily fluids to create a poisonous gas. When its enemies become disoriented from inhaling the gas, it attacks them.

name: salazzle
bio: For some reason, only females have been found. It creates a reverse harem of male Salandit that it lives with.

name: stufful
bio: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

name: bewear
bio: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming physical strength. Its habitat is generally off-limits.

name: bounsweet
bio: A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed whole by Toucannon lured by that wafting deliciousness.

name: steenee
bio: The sepals on its head developed to protect its body. These are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.

name: tsareena
bio: Its long, striking legs aren’t just for show but to be used to kick with skill. In victory, it shows off by kicking the defeated, laughing boisterously.

name: comfey
bio: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flowers, and they give off an aromatic scent.

name: oranguru
bio: Known for its extreme intelligence, this Pokémon will look down on inexperienced Trainers, so it’s best suited to veteran Trainers.

name: passimian
bio: They form groups of roughly 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable—they will never let down a comrade.

name: wimpod
bio: This Pokémon is a coward. As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leaves a sparkling clean path in its wake.

name: golisopod
bio: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater—or even air—right in two.

name: sandygast
bio: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.

name: palossand
bio: Possessed people controlled by this Pokémon transformed its sand mound into a castle. As it evolved, its power to curse grew ever stronger.

name: pyukumuku
bio: It’s covered in a slime that keeps its skin moist, allowing it to stay on land for days without drying up.

name: type-null
bio: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its intrinsic capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.

name: silvally
bio: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type, a flexibility that is well displayed in battle.

name: komala
bio: It is born asleep, and it dies asleep. All its movements are apparently no more than the results of it tossing and turning in its dreams.

name: turtonator
bio: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently if struck. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.

name: togedemaru
bio: The spiny fur on its back is normally at rest. When this Pokémon becomes agitated, its fur stands on end and stabs into its attackers.

name: bruxish
bio: When it unleashes its psychic power from the protuberance on its head, the grating sound of grinding teeth echoes through the area.

name: drampa
bio: It has a compassionate personality, but if it is angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its intense breath.

name: dhelmise
bio: Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.

name: jangmo-o
bio: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where Jangmo-o lives.

name: hakamo-o
bio: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches tear its opponents to shreds.

name: kommo-o
bio: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling the scales on its tail. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.

name: tapu-koko
bio: This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning inside its body.

name: tapu-lele
bio: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.

name: tapu-bulu
bio: It pulls large trees up by the roots and swings them around. It causes vegetation to grow, and then it absorbs energy from the growth.

name: tapu-fini
bio: The dense fog it creates brings the downfall and destruction of its confused enemies. Ocean currents are the source of its energy.

name: cosmog
bio: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.

name: cosmoem
bio: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of the stars.

name: solgaleo
bio: It is said to live in another world. The intense light it radiates from the surface of its body can make the darkest of nights light up like midday.

name: lunala
bio: It is said to be a female evolution of Cosmog. When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world.

name: nihilego
bio: One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent.

name: buzzwole
bio: This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear.

name: pheromosa
bio: One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds.

name: xurkitree
bio: One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses.

name: celesteela
bio: It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed.

name: kartana
bio: This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself.

name: guzzlord
bio: It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It’s one of the Ultra Beasts.

name: necrozma
bio: Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times.

name: magearna
bio: This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak.

name: marshadow
bio: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

name: poipole
bio: This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

name: naganadel
bio: It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.

name: stakataka
bio: It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.

name: blacephalon
bio: It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast.

name: zeraora
bio: It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks.

name: meltan
bio: It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel.

name: melmetal
bio: Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years.

name: grookey
bio: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

name: thwackey
bio: The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers.

name: rillaboom
bio: By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle.

name: scorbunny
bio: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.

name: raboot
bio: Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves.

name: cinderace
bio: It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched.

name: sobble
bio: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

name: drizzile
bio: A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms.

name: inteleon
bio: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

name: skwovet
bio: Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries.

name: greedent
bio: It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss.

name: rookidee
bio: It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit.

name: corvisquire
bio: Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies.

name: corviknight
bio: This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe.

name: blipbug
bio: A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t.

name: dottler
bio: It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers.

name: orbeetle
bio: It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power.

name: nickit
bio: Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains.

name: thievul
bio: It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it.

name: gossifleur
bio: It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly.

name: eldegoss
bio: The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them.

name: wooloo
bio: Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed.

name: dubwool
bio: Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it.

name: chewtle
bio: Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

name: drednaw
bio: With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

name: yamper
bio: This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail.

name: boltund
bio: This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days.

name: rolycoly
bio: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.

name: carkol
bio: It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region.

name: coalossal
bio: It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: applin
bio: It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more.

name: flapple
bio: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.

name: appletun
bio: Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.

name: silicobra
bio: As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand.

name: sandaconda
bio: When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened.

name: cramorant
bio: It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight.

name: arrokuda
bio: If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw.

name: barraskewda
bio: This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too.

name: toxel
bio: It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows.

name: sizzlipede
bio: It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot.

name: centiskorch
bio: When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies.

name: clobbopus
bio: It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land.

name: grapploct
bio: A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful.

name: sinistea
bio: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

name: polteageist
bio: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

name: hatenna
bio: Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you.

name: hattrem
bio: No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently.

name: hatterene
bio: It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others.

name: impidimp
bio: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.

name: morgrem
bio: When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair.

name: grimmsnarl
bio: With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp.

name: obstagoon
bio: Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct.

name: perrserker
bio: What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle.

name: cursola
bio: Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit.

name: sirfetchd
bio: Only Farfetch’d that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon’s leek withers, it will retire from combat.

name: mr-rime
bio: It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements.

name: runerigus
bio: A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move.

name: milcery
bio: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.

name: alcremie
bio: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream.

name: falinks
bio: Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute.

name: pincurchin
bio: It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines.

name: snom
bio: It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps.

name: frosmoth
bio: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.

name: stonjourner
bio: It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks.

name: cufant
bio: It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all.

name: copperajah
bio: They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water.

name: dracozolt
bio: In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources.

name: arctozolt
bio: The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

name: dracovish
bio: Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction.

name: arctovish
bio: Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head.

name: duraludon
bio: Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily.

name: dreepy
bio: After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas.

name: drakloak
bio: It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve.

name: dragapult
bio: When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles.

name: zacian
bio: Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle.

name: zamazenta
bio: In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle.

name: eternatus
bio: The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active.

name: kubfu
bio: Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves.

name: zarude
bio: Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it.

name: regieleki
bio: This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power.

name: regidrago
bio: An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven.

name: glastrier
bio: Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force.

name: spectrier
bio: It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body.

name: calyrex
bio: Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore.

name: wyrdeer
bio: The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing.

name: kleavor
bio: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.

name: ursaluna
bio: I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will.

name: sneasler
bio: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

name: overqwil
bio: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

name: sprigatito
bio: Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out.

name: floragato
bio: Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents.

name: meowscarada
bio: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

name: fuecoco
bio: It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy.

name: crocalor
bio: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.

name: skeledirge
bio: The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul.

name: quaxly
bio: This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime.

name: quaxwell
bio: These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully.

name: quaquaval
bio: A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands.

name: lechonk
bio: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.

name: tarountula
bio: The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy.

name: spidops
bio: It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it.

name: nymble
bio: It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs.

name: lokix
bio: When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order.

name: pawmi
bio: It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws.

name: pawmo
bio: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.

name: pawmot
bio: This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements.

name: tandemaus
bio: Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them.

name: fidough
bio: This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity.

name: dachsbun
bio: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

name: smoliv
bio: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.

name: dolliv
bio: Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.

name: arboliva
bio: This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.

name: nacli
bio: It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt.

name: naclstack
bio: This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body.

name: garganacl
bio: Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward.

name: charcadet
bio: Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents.

name: armarouge
bio: Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal.

name: ceruledge
bio: The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal.

name: tadbulb
bio: Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies.

name: bellibolt
bio: When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity.

name: wattrel
bio: When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them.

name: kilowattrel
bio: Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day.

name: maschiff
bio: It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face.

name: mabosstiff
bio: This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies.

name: shroodle
bio: Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire.

name: grafaiai
bio: The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests.

name: bramblin
bio: A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon.

name: brambleghast
bio: It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it.

name: toedscool
bio: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

name: toedscruel
bio: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.

name: klawf
bio: Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head.

name: capsakid
bio: The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become.

name: scovillain
bio: The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame.

name: rellor
bio: This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life.

name: rabsca
bio: The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball.

name: flittle
bio: Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly.

name: espathra
bio: It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament.

name: tinkatink
bio: It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal.

name: tinkatuff
bio: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.

name: tinkaton
bio: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.

name: wiglett
bio: This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand.

name: wugtrio
bio: It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den.

name: bombirdier
bio: It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

name: finizen
bio: It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures.

name: varoom
bio: It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory.

name: revavroom
bio: It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy.

name: cyclizar
bio: Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals.

name: orthworm
bio: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.

name: glimmet
bio: It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison.

name: glimmora
bio: When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body.

name: greavard
bio: It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon.

name: houndstone
bio: Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master.

name: flamigo
bio: This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak.

name: cetoddle
bio: This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer.

name: cetitan
bio: This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin.

name: veluza
bio: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.

name: dondozo
bio: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.

name: annihilape
bio: When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body.

name: clodsire
bio: When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line.

name: farigiraf
bio: Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s.

name: kingambit
bio: Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit.

name: great-tusk
bio: Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book.

name: scream-tail
bio: There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal.

name: brute-bonnet
bio: It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon.

name: flutter-mane
bio: This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book.

name: slither-wing
bio: This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing.

name: sandy-shocks
bio: No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal.

name: iron-treads
bio: This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens.

name: iron-bundle
bio: Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization.

name: iron-hands
bio: It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete.

name: iron-jugulis
bio: It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot.

name: iron-moth
bio: This Pokémon resembles an unknown object described in a paranormal magazine as a UFO sent to observe humanity.

name: iron-thorns
bio: It has some similarities to a Pokémon introduced in a dubious magazine as a Tyranitar from one billion years into the future.

name: frigibax
bio: Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores.

name: arctibax
bio: Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice.

name: baxcalibur
bio: This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava.

name: gimmighoul
bio: This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure.

name: gholdengo
bio: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.

name: wo-chien
bio: The grudge of a person punished for writing the king’s evil deeds upon wooden tablets has clad itself in dead leaves to become a Pokémon.

name: chien-pao
bio: This Pokémon can control 100 tons of fallen snow. It plays around innocently by leaping in and out of avalanches it has caused.

name: ting-lu
bio: The fear poured into an ancient ritual vessel has clad itself in rocks and dirt to become a Pokémon.

name: chi-yu
bio: It controls flames burning at over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. It casually swims through the sea of lava it creates by melting rock and sand.

name: roaring-moon
bio: It is possible that this is the creature listed as Roaring Moon in an expedition journal that still holds many mysteries.

name: iron-valiant
bio: It has some similarities to a mad scientist’s invention covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: koraidon
bio: This seems to be the Winged King mentioned in an old expedition journal. It was said to have split the land with its bare fists.

name: miraidon
bio: Much remains unknown about this creature. It resembles Cyclizar, but it is far more ruthless and powerful.

name: walking-wake
bio: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.

name: iron-leaves
bio: Many of its physical characteristics match those of a Virizion from the future that was covered in a paranormal magazine.

name: dipplin
bio: Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place.

name: poltchageist
bio: Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon.

name: sinistcha
bio: It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful.

name: okidogi
bio: After all its muscles were stimulated by the toxic chain around its neck, Okidogi transformed and gained a powerful physique.

name: munkidori
bio: The chain is made from toxins that enhance capabilities. It stimulated Munkidori's brain and caused the Pokémon's psychic powers to bloom.

name: fezandipiti
bio: Fezandipiti owes its beautiful looks and lovely voice to the toxic stimulants emanating from the chain wrapped around its body.

name: ogerpon
bio: This Pokémon's type changes based on which mask it's wearing. It confounds its enemies with nimble movements and kicks.

name: archaludon
bio: It gathers static electricity from its surroundings. The beams it launches when down on all fours are tremendously powerful.

name: hydrapple
bio: Seven syrpents live inside an apple made of syrup. The syrpent in the center is the commander.

name: gouging-fire
bio: There are scant few reports of this creature being sighted. One short video shows it rampaging and spouting pillars of flame.

name: raging-bolt
bio: It's said to incinerate everything around it with lightning launched from its fur. Very little is known about this creature.

name: iron-boulder
bio: It resembles a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a Terrakion that had been modified by an evil organization.

name: iron-crown
bio: It resembles a mysterious object introduced in a paranormal magazine as a cutting-edge weapon shaped like a Cobalion.

name: terapagos
bio: Terapagos protects itself using its power to transform energy into hard crystals. This Pokémon is the source of the Terastal phenomenon.

name: pecharunt
bio: It feeds others toxic mochi that draw out desires and capabilities. Those who eat the mochi fall under Pecharunt’s control, chained to its will.

name: rattata alola
bio: Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day.

name: raticate alola
bio: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

name: raichu alola
bio: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power.

name: sandshrew alola
bio: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: sandslash alola
bio: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

name: vulpix alola
bio: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

name: ninetales alola
bio: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

name: diglett alola
bio: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: dugtrio alola
bio: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: meowth alola
bio: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: persian alola
bio: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: geodude alola
bio: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

name: graveler alola
bio: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

name: golem alola
bio: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

name: grimer alola
bio: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

name: muk alola
bio: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

name: exeggutor alola
bio: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.

name: marowak alola
bio: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

name: meowth galar
bio: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: ponyta galar
bio: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

name: rapidash galar
bio: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

name: slowpoke galar
bio: It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten.

name: slowbro galar
bio: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

name: farfetchd galar
bio: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.

name: weezing galar
bio: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

name: articuno galar
bio: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: zapdos galar
bio: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

name: moltres galar
bio: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

name: slowking galar
bio: It has incredible intellect and in­ tuition. Whatever the situation, it remains calm and collected.

name: corsola galar
bio: It continuously sheds and grows. The tip of its head is prized as a treasure for its beauty.

name: zigzagoon galar
bio: ZIGZAGOON restlessly wanders everywhere at all times. This POKéMON does so because it is very curious. It becomes interested in anything that it happens to see.

name: linoone galar
bio: LINOONE always runs full speed and only in straight lines. If facing an obstacle, it makes a right-angle turn to evade it. This POKéMON is very challenged by gently curving roads.

name: darumaka galar
bio: When its internal fire is burning, it cannot calm down and it runs around. When the fire diminishes, it falls asleep.

name: darmanitan galar zen
bio: Its internal fire burns at 2,500° F, making enough power that it can destroy a dump truck with one punch.

name: yamask galar
bio: Each of them carries a mask that used to be its face when it was human. Sometimes they look at it and cry.

name: stunfisk galar
bio: Its skin is very hard, so it is unhurt even if stepped on by sumo wrestlers. It smiles when transmitting electricity.

name: growlithe hisui
bio: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: arcanine hisui
bio: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

name: voltorb hisui
bio: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.

name: electrode hisui
bio: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: typhlosion hisui
bio: If its rage peaks, it becomes so hot that anything that touches it will instantly go up in flames.

name: qwilfish hisui
bio: To fire its poison spikes, it must inflate its body by drinking over 2.6 gallons of water all at once.

name: sneasel hisui
bio: Its paws conceal sharp claws. If attacked, it sud­ denly extends the claws and startles its enemy.

name: samurott hisui
bio: One swing of the sword incorporated in its armor can fell an opponent. A simple glare from one of them quiets everybody.

name: lilligant hisui
bio: Even veteran Trainers face a challenge in getting its beautiful flower to bloom. This Pokémon is popular with celebrities.

name: zorua hisui
bio: It changes into the forms of others to surprise them. Apparently, it often transforms into a silent child.

name: zoroark hisui
bio: Bonds between these Pokémon are very strong. It protects the safety of its pack by tricking its opponents.

name: braviary hisui
bio: They fight for their friends without any thought about danger to themselves. One can carry a car while flying.

name: sliggoo hisui
bio: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can’t see anything.

name: goodra hisui
bio: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokémon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.

name: avalugg hisui
bio: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.

name: decidueye hisui
bio: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble at distances over a hundred yards.

name: Tishark
bio:
Vive escondido nas ruínas submersas da região de Nendo e raramente se aproxima da superfície. Sua presença é percebida apenas pela névoa arroxeada que fica para trás. Seu pequeno tamanho engana os adversários. Com uma única mordida, Tishark consegue partir conchas espessas antes de desaparecer nas profundezas.

Sua couraça óssea em formato de elmo protege a cabeça contra impactos e serve para intimidar intrusos muito maiores do que ele. Quando percebe perigo, libera uma névoa escura produzida por compostos naturais presentes em sua pele, desaparecendo antes que o oponente consiga reagir.

name: Phylite
bio: Phylite evita grandes cidades pois não gosta de competir sua própria luminosidade com outras fontes de luz. Quando vistos, eles sempre saltitam enquanto piscam sua luz, o que causa a sensação de que estão se teletransportando.
condicao: Apenas durante a noite. Não encontrado em Neo Techland.

name: Shiinoluz
bio: A aparência de Shiinoluz engana aqueles que não conhecem sua capacidade natural de se divertir ao causar problemas, com registros antigos indicando que os primeiros humanos a terem contato com esse Pokémon o consideraram maligno. Para capturar um Shiinoluz, deve-se demonstrar ser mais esperto que ele, lhe pregando uma peça ou enganando.

name: (N) Meowth
bio: O líder de um bando de Meowth costuma ser aquele que tem mais moedas. Grupos se reúnem com frequência para apostar seus ganhos, definindo a hierarquia que muda a todo instante. A principal presa dos Meowth, devido ao apego peculiar que a espécie tem por ouro, são os Gimmighoul que tendem a desenvolver fobia aos Meowth por suas tentativas incessantes de roubá-los.

name: (N) Persian
bio: Mascotes de grandes magnatas, os Persian de Nendo manipulam moedas em busca de aperfeiçoar os próprios truques para conseguir mais dinheiro. Dizem que este Pokémon atrai fortuna por onde vai, sendo egoísta por natureza e não dividindo seus ganhos com outros de sua espécie. Quanto maior a fortuna de seu treinador, mais carinho Persian demonstrará a ele.

name: Purruff
bio: Diferentemente de Meowth e Persian, Purruff deixa de reunir dinheiro e passar a guardar tesouros de maior valor, como pepitas de ouro e moedas antigas. A mentalidade desse Pokémon é especialmente aguçada no que diz respeito a lucro, e quando seu treinador está prestes a fazer uma negociação ruim, seus bigodes eriçam.

name: Tinyvine (Desert Form)
bio:
Viajantes desavisados que atravessam as areias de Nendo constantemente acabam pisando nesse Pokémon, enterrado na areia. 

Tinyvine nativos do deserto utilizam seus espinhos para se proteger de predadores. São capazes de atirá-los em grande distância. Seu corpo é basicamente um reservatório de água, o que atrai Pokémon sedentos.

name: tauros paldea aqua breed
bio: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: wooper paldea
bio: This POKéMON lives in cold water. It will leave the water to search for food when it gets cold outside.
